assertions.title: $1000 buy simulation
assertions.reason: Script executed and reported estimated fill/slippage/latency/gas, but the required on-chain fill was not confirmed: fill verification returned false with no trade events and no balance delta.

steps.action: Derive APTOS_PRIVATE_KEY from .aptos/config.yaml profile cash-testnet (strip optional ed25519-priv- prefix) and run buy simulation
steps.expected: $1000 market buy fills against seeded levels and output reports fill price, slippage %, and gas cost
steps.observed: Command exited 0 and reported metrics plus tx 0x203089150d5bc158a09699fdc741e5957ea755221d4908cf37d85af115b9c838, but report states 'Fill NOT verified — no trade events found and no balance change detected'

commands.command: APTOS_PRIVATE_KEY=<redacted from cash-testnet profile> CONTRACT_ADDRESS=0xe66fef668077ab8dc5ea65539b6250d8ca3fc024ea4f16555fca9eaeb73b41d1 APTOS_NETWORK=testnet pnpm --filter @cash/scripts buy-simulation

assertions.issues: Assertion requires an order fill against seeded levels; concrete output shows unverified fill (no trade events, no balance delta).

assertions.title: Market maker bot test
assertions.reason: Script cannot proceed past taker setup because generated taker accounts cannot be faucet-funded programmatically in current Aptos testnet flow, causing INSUFFICIENT_BALANCE_FOR_TRANSACTION_FEE before ladder/fill/rebalance steps.

steps.action: Derive APTOS_PRIVATE_KEY from .aptos/config.yaml profile cash-testnet (strip optional ed25519-priv- prefix) and run market-maker-test
steps.expected: Script places 10 bid/10 ask ladders, handles simulated fill, then rebalances with inventory tracking
steps.observed: Command exited 1 during taker setup: faucet funding failed and mint transaction aborted with INSUFFICIENT_BALANCE_FOR_TRANSACTION_FEE

steps.action: Retry market-maker-test with same required env values
steps.expected: Transient issue recovers and script proceeds through ladder/fill/rebalance
steps.observed: Retry exited 1 with same blocker (faucet funding unavailable and INSUFFICIENT_BALANCE_FOR_TRANSACTION_FEE)

commands.command: APTOS_PRIVATE_KEY=<redacted from cash-testnet profile> CONTRACT_ADDRESS=0xe66fef668077ab8dc5ea65539b6250d8ca3fc024ea4f16555fca9eaeb73b41d1 APTOS_NETWORK=testnet pnpm --filter @cash/scripts market-maker-test

APTOS_PRIVATE_KEY=<redacted from cash-testnet profile> CONTRACT_ADDRESS=0xe66fef668077ab8dc5ea65539b6250d8ca3fc024ea4f16555fca9eaeb73b41d1 APTOS_NETWORK=testnet pnpm --filter @cash/scripts market-maker-test (retry)

evidence.network: Aptos fullnode POST /v1/transactions returned 400 vm_error INSUFFICIENT_BALANCE_FOR_TRANSACTION_FEE during taker USD1 mint

assertions.issues: Blocked by external prerequisite (funded taker gas account) not satisfied in current environment; script never reached ladder/fill/rebalance validation steps.

frictions.description: market-maker-test auto-generates a taker account and attempts programmatic faucet funding, but Aptos testnet currently returns 'no way to programmatically mint testnet APT'; this is not captured as an explicit prerequisite in the assertion contract.
frictions.resolution: Retried command with same mandated env values; blocker persisted.

blockers.description: Generated taker account lacks APT for transaction fees, and faucet funding path in script is unavailable programmatically in this environment.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried market-maker-test once with same Aptos profile-derived credentials; same INSUFFICIENT_BALANCE_FOR_TRANSACTION_FEE error persisted.

summary: Retested 2 assertions with Aptos profile credentials: VAL-INTEG-001 failed (run succeeded but fill not verified), VAL-INTEG-002 blocked (taker funding prerequisite unavailable; repeated INSUFFICIENT_BALANCE_FOR_TRANSACTION_FEE).
